summary.shape_sentence: Bullish morning trend expansion into late-morning HOD, then broad midday/afternoon consolidation with a soft pullback and modest late reclaim.

goat.note: Cleanest and strongest move: post-open upside drive from roughly 25825 to 25970 into the 10:30 continuation.

red_circles.behavior: Bearish pivots appeared after the late-morning high, mainly on lower highs below the 26000 to 26060 supply area.

green_circles.behavior: Bullish pivots worked best after the early flush and on repeated demand defenses around 25900 to 25920.

orange_banks_supply.behavior: Supply around 25980 to 26060 was partially broken in the morning but respected during afternoon continuation attempts.

blue_banks_demand.behavior: Demand around 25900 to 25920 was defended multiple times after the midday selloff and late-afternoon pullback.

time_markers.10am_blue: Strong upside momentum already active near 25900, with price driving away from the opening range.
time_markers.12pm_red: Pullback from HOD underway; market transitioning from trend to range.
time_markers.2pm_green: Afternoon balance below supply, recovering from the 13:00 flush but lacking clean continuation.
time_markers.4pm_yellow: Closed bullish versus open near 25950, above defended demand but well below HOD.

takeaway: Bullish morning trend day with a powerful post-open drive, followed by afternoon balance and defended demand. Best comparable: early flush reclaimed into trend expansion, then failed continuation above late-morning supply.
